waves.point_eqs_str: a['n']=(a['sample']*6.28); a['xp']=(Math.sin(a['n'])*0.3); a['yp']=(Math.cos(a['n'])*0.3); a['zp']=0; a['scale']=((Math.tan((a['n']*(Math.sin(div(a['time'],10))*10)))*0.5)+0.5); a['scale']=Math.min(a['scale'], (0.5+(a['bass']*0.5))); a['scale']=Math.max(a['scale'], -0.5); a['xp']=(a['xp']*a['scale']); a['yp']=(a['yp']*a['scale']); a['zp']=Math.max((0.5-(Math.min(Math.abs(a['scale']), 0.5)*2)), 0); a['zp']=(pow((1-a['zp']), 2)*0.25); a['ang']=(a['time']*0.5); a['xq']=a['xp']; a['yq']=((a['yp']*Math.sin(a['ang']))+(a['zp']*Math.cos(a['ang']))); a['zq']=((a['yp']*Math.cos(a['ang']))-(a['zp']*Math.sin(a['ang']))); a['ang']=a['time']; a['xp']=((a['xq']*Math.sin(a['ang']))+(a['zq']*Math.cos(a['ang']))); a['yp']=a['yq']; a['zp']=((a['xq']*Math.cos(a['ang']))-(a['zq']*Math.sin(a['ang']))); a['zp']=(a['zp']+1.1); a['xs']=div(a['xp'],a['zp']); a['ys']=div(a['yp'],a['zp']); a['x']=(a['xs']+0.5); a['y']=((a['ys']*1.3)+0.5); a['r']=(((Math.sin(a['time'])*0.5)+0.5)*0.5); a['g']=(((Math.cos(div(a['time'],2))*0.5)+0.5)*0.8); a['b']=Math.tan(a['time']);
